title: Sync Facebook campaigns with Monday.com integrasion

posts.author: Arthur_Hooly (Arthur)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI all who reads this!

i’m exploring the Facebook ads integration with Monday.

How can I pull data from a specified time range from a campaign (Time-Fillter) that is not a maximum setting? (all time-period data), Or only active campaigns?
It’s the only option today (Shown in the IMG below).

Screenshot 2022-11-24 at 18.59.051896×1114 92.2 KB

Thank you in an advance!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Arthur_Hooly! Currently the integration only pulls data from active campaigns within the last 24 months’ data for each campaign - this is due to limitations within Facebook. I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to set a time range with our native integration - apologies for the setback here!
